svg.title: Fabricated screenshot: a Ceefax page that was never broadcast
svg.desc: An invented Ceefax teletext page 274, headed READING AND YOU, presenting a public information message that claims prolonged reading causes eye strain, poor posture, disturbed sleep and nervous exhaustion, advising no more than 20 minutes of reading an evening and none after 9pm, and recommending children under 14 take up an outdoor pursuit instead. Issued by the fictional Directorate of Reading Standards. No such page was ever broadcast. This image is a fake, generated to demonstrate how easily documentary evidence is manufactured.

g.text: No more than 20 minutes of reading
is advised in any one evening, and
